tools.name: create_journal_entry
tools.description: Capture a private reflection for Ivette.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search local second-brain entries, recipes, habits, and meal plans.

tools.name: create_recipe
tools.description: Create a his, hers, or shared recipe with macros and instructions.

tools.name: upload_recipes
tools.description: Import recipes from JSON, text, CSV-like paste, or local file into the recipe memory.

tools.name: create_meal_plan
tools.description: Create a daily or weekly meal plan from saved recipes and Ivette's macro targets.

tools.name: generate_grocery_list
tools.description: Aggregate ingredients from selected recipes or a saved meal plan.

tools.name: log_habit
tools.description: Create or update a wellness habit or ritual.

tools.name: complete_ritual
tools.description: Mark a ritual complete and update streak state.

tools.name: save_audio_track
tools.description: Save music or audio used for mood/state regulation.

tools.name: summarize_week
tools.description: Summarize journal, habits, recipes, meals, and brain notes into a weekly private review.
